name: Loox Visual Product Reviews API
what_it_does: Loox visual product reviews REST API for Shopify merchants to collect, display, and syndicate photo and video product reviews with automated review request emails, referral program, and Google Shopping integration. Enables AI agents to manage review request email automation for post-purchase review collection, handle photo and video review moderation and approval for content quality automation, access review display widget configuration for storefront social proof automation, retrieve review syndication to Google Shopping for search visibility automation, manage referral discount offer for reviewed order incentive automation, handle review import from Amazon, AliExpress, and other platforms for review consolidation automation, access review analytics and rating distribution for product performance automation, retrieve store reviews and brand reviews separate from product reviews for brand credibility automation, manage multi-store review sharing for enterprise store network automation, and integrate Loox with Shopify, Google Shopping, Facebook Shops, and email platforms for end-to-end visual UGC review automation.
use_cases: Collecting photo reviews from post-purchase automation agents
Syndicating reviews to Google from product search agents
Moderating UGC content from review quality agents
Importing reviews from marketplace consolidation agents
not_for: B2B company reviews and vendor ratings (use G2 or Trustpilot)
Service business reviews without physical product (use Podium or Birdeye)
best_when: A Shopify merchant wanting AI agents to automate photo/video review collection, Google Shopping syndication, review moderation, and referral program management through Loox's visual review platform.
avoid_when: SHOPIFY PLATFORM DEPENDENCY — NON-SHOPIFY NOT SUPPORTED: Loox is built exclusively for Shopify; automated review workflows for non-Shopify platforms (WooCommerce, BigCommerce) must use different review platform (Yotpo, Okendo); automated review system design that assumes Loox portability across e-commerce platforms creates platform lock-in. REVIEW REQUEST EMAIL TIMING FOR POST-PURCHASE AUTOMATION: Loox review request emails are triggered by fulfillment events with configurable delay; automated review collection timing must balance freshness (request too soon before product arrives) vs recency (request too late when excitement fades); typical optimization is 7-14 days post-delivery for highest photo review submission rates. GDPR PHOTO CONSENT FOR REVIEW COLLECTION IN EU: Loox photo reviews include customer-submitted photos; automated review collection in EU must ensure Loox's review request email includes GDPR-compliant photo usage consent; automated review display of EU customer photos without consent disclosure creates GDPR compliance risk for Shopify store.

auth.notes: Loox uses API key for integrations. REST API with JSON. Tel Aviv, Israel HQ. Founded 2015 by Tal Revivo. Bootstrapped (profitable). Shopify-exclusive app. Products: Photo/video reviews, review request emails, referral program, Google Shopping feed, review import, store reviews. Google Shopping/Facebook Shops syndication. GDPR. Serves 100,000+ Shopify merchants. Competes with Yotpo, Okendo, and Judge.me for Shopify product reviews.

pricing.paid_tiers: Beginner ($9.99/mo), Scale ($34.99/mo), Unlimited ($299.99/mo); annual discount; based on order volume
pricing.notes: Tel Aviv Israel. Bootstrapped. Order-volume-based pricing. 14-day trial. Shopify app store billing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; review and analytics queries throttled; webhooks for review submit and moderation events

known_agent_gotchas: REVIEW MODERATION STATUS BEFORE DISPLAY: Loox reviews submitted by customers enter moderation queue before public display; automated review feed integration must filter by approved status; automated social proof automation using unmoderated reviews exposes pending or rejected reviews to storefront visitors

GOOGLE SHOPPING FEED SYNC TIMING: Loox Google Shopping review feed updates with slight delay after review approval; automated SEO reporting for product star ratings in search results must account for Google's crawl frequency to pick up new reviews; automated review count reporting may show Loox-approved count before Google Shopping reflects updated rating

PHOTO REVIEW MEDIA URL EXPIRY FOR EXTERNAL INTEGRATION: Loox photo review media URLs may have time-limited access tokens; automated external display integration (embedding Loox photos in other platforms) must handle URL refresh; automated UGC content pipeline using cached Loox photo URLs creates broken image display when URLs expire

REFERRAL DISCOUNT CODE UNIQUENESS FOR AUTOMATED CAMPAIGNS: Loox referral program generates unique discount codes per reviewed order; automated email marketing integration using Loox referral codes must handle per-order unique code distribution; automated bulk discount code campaigns cannot reuse Loox referral codes across multiple customers

IMPORT REVIEW DEDUPLICATION FOR MARKETPLACE CONSOLIDATION: Loox review import from Amazon/AliExpress creates new review records; automated review consolidation from multiple sources may create duplicate reviews for same customer-product combination; implement deduplication check before automated review import from multiple marketplaces
agent_readiness.security_notes: Product reviews. GDPR. API key. US. Customer review, photo/video, and UGC data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Product reviews. GDPR. API key. US. Customer review and UGC data.
